name: Easter Bunnies Scatter Accent Rug Lilac - Room Essentials™
description:
Add festive charm to your space with this Easter Bunnies Scatter Accent Rug from Room Essentials™. Made from 100% polyester material, the rectangular accent rug features an Easter bunnies print for a whimsical look, and the latex backing helps keep it in place. Suitable for indoor use, you can place this flat-pile rug by the entryway, kitchen or living room.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
